# Emanuele Faraci — Portfolio

> Software Developer, FullStack Engineer, AI Engineer, Bot Developer, and Automation Builder based in Modena, Italy.

## About

Emanuele Faraci is a Computer Science student at UNIMORE and an indie/freelance developer focused on fullstack products, AI systems, bots, and automation. Main stack includes Next.js + TypeScript on frontend, Python/FastAPI on backend, and practical DevOps with VPS, Nginx, Docker, and Cloudflare.

## Journey

- **2020 → 2025** · High School · Human Science — Psychology, pedagogy, sociology and anthropology. Learning how people think and interact.
- **2022 → 2026** · Indie builder · freelance — From landing pages to full-stack apps. Frontend, backend, databases and devops. Bots, automations, AI agents, RAG systems.
- **2025 → now** · UNIMORE · Computer Science — Software eng & distributed systems, AI & machine learning.

## Skills

- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, Vite, Vercel
- **Backend**: Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, REST APIs, Webhooks
- **AI & ML**: OpenAI, Model fine-tuning, RAG, Google GenAI, LangChain, Hugging Face, AI agents, Image generation
- **Bots & Automation**: Telegram API, Discord.js, Python Discord, Cron jobs, Chatbots, Inline keyboards, Automation pipelines
- **DevOps & Infra**: Nginx, UFW, Cloudflare, VPS setup, Linux, Docker, SEO

## Hero Roles

- Software Developer
- FullStack Engineer
- AI Engineer
- Bot Developer
- Python Developer
- Automation Builder
- Creative Coder

## Projects

- **Patty Concept Website** *(concept / 2026)* — Concept website for a burger place in Modena. Full design system and codebase from scratch. [Live](https://patty.emqnuele.dev)
- **Pulsar · Hackathon Winner** *(winner / 2026)* — University social web app built at JeMore with team HyperLabs. 1st place winner. Connects students through smart onboarding, matching, events, and gamification-driven retention. [Live](https://pulsar.emqnuele.dev)
- **ProjectBEA** *(live)* — Modular autonomous AI persona engine with RAG memory, OBS ws, Discord, and Minecraft agent. Supports swappable LLM/TTS plus plugin-based skills. [GitHub](https://github.com/emqnuele/projectBEA) · [Live](https://projectbea.emqnuele.dev)
- **QuickLanding** *(client / 2026)* — Full-stack production SaaS for a client with multi-agent backend, dashboard, database layer, sandboxed workflows, email automation, and hardened VPS infra. No public links.
- **Omni** *(2026)* — Full-featured streaming platform built from scratch as a personal learning project (invite system, tracking, favorites, recommendation engine, watch together, full infra setup). No public links.
- **VPS Helper Bot** *(prod / 2025)* — Telegram bot for VPS and Docker monitoring with crash/threshold alerts and mute controls. No public links.
- **Humanlike Telegram Bot** *(live / 2025)* — Highly realistic AI Telegram bot powered by Google GenAI API with natural split messages and dynamic typing delays. [GitHub](https://github.com/emqnuele/humanlike-telegram-bot)
- **Minesweeper** *(prod / 2025)* — Minesweeper game with cheats. [GitHub](https://github.com/emqnuele/Minesweeper) · [Live](https://minesweeper.emqnuele.dev/)
- **AllConverter** *(prod / 2026)* — Local file converter supporting image/audio/video/document conversions with advanced processing options. [GitHub](https://github.com/emqnuele/AllConverter) · [Live](https://allconverter.emqnuele.dev/)
- **Clicker** *(beta / 2025)* — Clicker game built with React and TypeScript. [Live](https://click.gecowave.top/)
- **Gecowave Website** *(beta / 2025)* — Custom website designed and developed for a music group. [Live](https://gecowave.top/)
- **Instagram AI Bot** *(prod / 2025)* — Instagram DM automation with AI persona and human-like behavior simulation. [GitHub](https://github.com/emqnuele/insta-bot)
- **Portfolio Website** *(live)* — This website, built with Next.js and modern UI stack. [GitHub](https://github.com/emqnuele/portfolio) · [Live](https://emanuelefaraci.com/)
- **Simple Web Scraper** *(beta / 2025)* — Modular Python scraper with batch extraction and structured JSON output. [GitHub](https://github.com/emqnuele/webscraper)
- **Markolino-Chaos** *(beta / 2025)* — Paper plugin that spawns a Minecraft bot enemy. [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/plugin/markolino-chaos)
- **Quick ResourcePack Mod** *(live on modrinth)* — Fabric mod to toggle resource packs ingame via keybind. [GitHub](https://github.com/emqnuele/quick-resource-pack) · [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/quick-resource-pack)
